q1.text: What type of activities do you find most appealing?

options.text: Working with technologies, building things, or analyzing data
Creating visual art, writing, or physical/sports activities
Leading groups, teaching, or caring for others

q2_stem.text: Within science and technology, where does your interest lean?

options.text: Software, coding, and digital systems
Physical machines, robotics, or hardware design
Theoretical science, data patterns, or scientific research

q2_creative.text: What kind of creative work resonates with you?

options.text: Visual layouts, UI/UX, or graphic design
Reading, analyzing text, debate, or writing articles
Athletic activities, fitness training, or outdoor sports

q2_social.text: What role do you prefer when working with others?

options.text: Organizing teams, planning strategy, or managing business operations
Helping individuals, clinical care, or health support
Teaching, training, or explaining complex concepts

q3_tech.text: What type of software tasks do you enjoy?

options.text: Writing code, solving algorithms, and building backend logic
Analyzing databases, running queries, and drawing insights from data

q3_eng.text: What field of engineering excites you?

options.text: Robotics, aerospace, or mechanical systems
Electrical systems, circuits, or computer hardware

q3_sci.text: What style of research do you prefer?

options.text: Academic or scientific inquiry in a laboratory environment
Statistical analysis, mathematical proofs, or financial modeling

q3_design.text: Where do you want to apply your design skills?

options.text: Digital platforms, website layouts, and mobile app UI/UX
Physical branding, illustrations, print media, or fashion

q3_writing.text: What is your main interest in language and communication?

options.text: Constructing logical arguments, analyzing policies, or interpreting laws
Creative storytelling, copywriting, or journalism

q3_sports.text: What aspect of sports and fitness appeals to you most?

options.text: Competing, athletic training, and physical performance
Coaching others, planning workouts, and team sports management

q3_biz.text: What area of business operations do you prefer?

options.text: Leading a startup, launching new initiatives, and taking calculated risks
Managing team structure, project timelines, and corporate strategy

q3_health.text: What area of healthcare is most interesting?

options.text: Medical diagnostics, surgery, or clinical treatments
Physical therapy, mental counseling, or direct patient care

q3_edu.text: Who is your ideal audience for teaching?

options.text: Students in a classroom, school, or university setting
Adult professionals, corporate training, or coaching clients

q4.text: When working on a project, what is your preferred approach?

options.text: Structuring a clear plan, identifying risks, and organizing tasks
Diving straight into implementation, building, or writing code
Brainstorming creative ideas, visual sketches, and concepts

q5.text: How do you feel about working with numbers, statistics, and datasets?

options.text: I enjoy finding patterns, running formulas, and making data-backed decisions
I prefer working with text, stories, or verbal communication
I prefer working with physical materials, tools, or physical activity

q6.text: How do you prefer to interact with other people in your work?

options.text: I love leading teams, coordinating people, and speaking publicly
I prefer supporting others one-on-one, listening, and counseling
I work best independently, focusing deeply on my own tasks

q7.text: What kind of workspace environment fits you best?

options.text: An office or remote desk setup with a computer
A dynamic environment like a lab, hospital, classroom, or courtroom
Outdoors, sports facilities, workshops, or physical construction sites

q8.text: When faced with a complex problem, what is your first instinct?

options.text: Analyze it logically, break it down, or write a program to solve it
Discuss it with a group, teach/explain it, or coordinate a solution
Research the background theory and read literature about it

q9.text: What is your attitude toward rules, regulations, and details?

options.text: I enjoy analyzing rules, drafting agreements, or arguing cases
I prefer creative freedom without strict rules or boundaries
I like structured, technical standards (e.g. coding syntax, engineering manuals)

q10.text: Which type of success metric would make you feel most proud?

options.text: Launching a high-quality product, software app, or physical build
Positively impacting someone's life, health, or education directly
Winning a business contract, leading a company, or winning a court case
